creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Rick,

there hasn't been an update on the problem report you sent for quite a
while (see [1]). In my opinion, a better place to discuss it would be the
ports mailing list - after all, noone has commented on the issue here
since you sent it -, and send a new PR once patches exist to resolve the
issue. If you don't mind, I'm going to close this PR.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140232
